creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)
That will teach me to _NOT_ blindly upload the patch _AFTER_ running one last git rebase. I totally missed the commit by nc@ which brings the radarr port up-to-date. I still had this change for the export PATH in the rc file, but the rebase brought in the new version.

Sorry, will keep this in mind next time and be more careful.
